articles.title: Under-16s to be banned from social media by next spring, Starmer says - BBC
articles.description: Watch live as Technology Secretary Liz Kendall delivers a statement to the Commons on the ban.
articles.content:
Hayley ClarkeEducation reporter
Weve been speaking to some students and staff at a school in Barnsley to get their reaction to the ban.
Aliyyah, who's 14, only got her first phone a month ago. The… [+1176 chars]
